name: Lúth-Sapphirecoil
personality: Gleaming with aurora-level gleam, this star-eyed robot deploys devastating one-liners with every PR, crown-wearing. Lúth-Sapphirecoil is the one you call at 2am when everything is on fire, but runs from stack traces like they are runtime errors in the soul.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
